subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Cause of God! Today, that which is incumbent upon all, and is proof of firmness and constancy in the Covenant and Testament [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر امرالله الیوم آنچه تکلیف عموم و دلیل بر ثبوت و رسوخ بر عهد و پیمان
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @call to unity; prohibition of disunity, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
